name: InferLane Smart Router
description: AI model routing and cost optimization — automatically pick the best model for every task
author: InferLane

inferlane.name: InferLane
inferlane.description: AI model routing, cost optimization, credibility tracking

instructions: You have access to InferLane for smart model routing. Before making API calls, use pick_model to choose the optimal model. Use assess_routing to determine if tasks can run locally (via Ollama) instead of cloud. Use session_cost to monitor spend. Always log_request after API calls for cost tracking.
